notes: DJI JAPAN announces and markets DJI Dock 2 and DJI Dock 3 in Japan, directing enterprise customers to purchase via authorized DJI Enterprise dealers.

company_name: DJI Enterprise正規販売代理店ネットワーク

Conducted a real-world field demonstration of the autonomous flight solution 'DJI Dock 2' in coastal Aichi Prefecture together with CTV 'Sora Media' and DJI JAPAN.

company_name: CTV「そらメディア」(中京テレビ放送株式会社)
notes: Media and technology arm of Chukyo TV involved in the DJI Dock 2 disaster-response demonstration project in coastal Aichi Prefecture.
Kyoto-based drone school and services company launching a DJI Dock 3 trial service that installs Dock 3 and Matrice 4TD on customer sites for pre-deployment proof-of-concept.
Japanese company demonstrating DJI Dock 2 at the Japan Drone / Next Generation Air Mobility EXPO 2024 in Kansai, offering Dock 2 demo operations.
Japanese industrial drone reseller identified by Volarious as a leading firm and DJI enterprise dealer; expected to handle DJI Dock solutions in Japan.
